channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NTPC] NTPC Group adds 87.50 MW solar capacity via NGEL subsidiary
item.description:
NTPC Ltd's subsidiary, NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), announced the declaration of Commercial Operation Date (COD) for 87.50 MW of solar capacity. This capacity is part of a larger 150 MW solar project located in Rajasthan, developed by Project Eleven Renewable Power Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of NGEL's joint venture. The COD is effective from April 19, 2026. This addition increases the NTPC Group's total installed capacity to 89,615 MW and commercial capacity to 88,535 MW. For the NGEL Group, its total installed capacity will rise to 10,363.90 MW.

  • NGEL declared COD for 87.50 MW solar capacity in Rajasthan.
  • This capacity is part of a 150 MW solar project.
  • NTPC Group's total installed capacity now stands at 89,615 MW.
  • NGEL Group's installed capacity increases to 10,363.90 MW.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NTPC LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Trade: Promoter Group member acquires 42 Lac shares via Rights Issue
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd received a disclosure from Ssamta Amar Gaala, a member of its Promoter Group, regarding the acquisition of 42,00,000 equity shares. The acquisition was executed through a Rights Issue on April 13, 2026. This transaction increased Ssamta Amar Gaala's shareholding in the company from 2.18% (1,25,00,000 shares) to 2.39% (1,67,00,000 shares). The disclosure was made under Regulation 7(1)(b) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Promoter Group member Ssamta Amar Gaala acquired shares.
  • 42,00,000 equity shares were acquired by the promoter.
  • The acquisition was made through a Rights Issue.
  • Shareholding increased from 2.18% to 2.39% post-acquisition.
  • Disclosure filed under SEBI PIT Regulations 7(1)(b).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Promoter Group Increases Stake by 0.20% via Rights Issue
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd's promoter group, comprising Ssamta Amar Gaala and Amar Gaala, has increased its shareholding in the company. The group acquired 42,00,000 equity shares, representing a 0.20% stake, through a rights issue on April 13, 2026. Prior to this acquisition, the promoter group held 1,25,00,000 shares (2.19%). Following the acquisition, their total holding stands at 1,67,00,000 shares, which represents 2.18% of the company's total equity share capital after the rights issue. This disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Enbee's promoter group acquired 42 lakh additional shares.
  • The acquisition represents a 0.20% increase in their stake.
  • Shares were acquired through a rights issue on April 13, 2026.
  • Promoter holding now totals 1.67 crore shares, or 2.18%.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI SAST Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [PSTITANIA] PS Titania FY26 Audit: No Modified Opinion from Statutory Auditors
item.description:
Propshare Titania SM REIT (Second Scheme) announced that its Statutory Auditors have not expressed any modified opinion in the Audit Reports for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure indicates a clean audit report, suggesting that the financial statements present a true and fair view of the company's financial position and performance without any significant reservations from the auditors. This is generally viewed positively by investors, reflecting sound financial reporting and corporate governance.

  • Statutory Auditors issued a clean audit report for FY26.
  • No modified opinion indicates financial statements are fair.
  • Positive for investor confidence and corporate governance.
  • Applies to Propshare Titania SM REIT (Second Scheme).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Propshare Titania SM REIT - IPO (Second scheme of the Property Share Investment Trust) | Category: Auditor

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Trade: Promoter Group acquires 5.65% stake
item.description:
Bharathi Narendra Gala, a member of the promoter group of Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd, acquired 3,95,00,000 equity shares, representing 5.65% of the company's total voting capital. This acquisition, completed on April 13, 2026, increased the promoter group's total shareholding to 3,97,06,810 shares, or 5.69% of the diluted share capital. The disclosure was made under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Promoter group member Bharathi Narendra Gala acquired shares.
  • Acquisition involved 3,95,00,000 equity shares.
  • This represents a 5.65% stake in the company.
  • Total promoter group holding now stands at 5.69%.
  • The transaction occurred on April 13, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HINDPETRO] HPCL HRRL Project Cost Revised to ₹79,459 Cr; HPCL Invests ₹19,600 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HPCL) announced that the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas has approved a significant revision in the project cost for HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL). The project cost has been revised from ₹43,129 Crore to ₹79,459 Crore. Consequently, HPCL's equity investment in HRRL will increase to ₹19,600 Crore to maintain its 74% stake. HRRL is a greenfield integrated refinery-cum-petrochemical complex, characterized by a high Nelson Complexity Index of 17 and petrochemical intensity of 26%. The project is currently in an advanced stage of commissioning, with trial runs of the Crude Distillation Unit (CDU) and other units already underway. This update signifies a major financial commitment and progress towards the operationalization of the refinery.

  • HRRL project cost revised to ₹79,459 Cr from ₹43,129 Cr.
  • HPCL's equity investment in HRRL increased to ₹19,600 Cr.
  • HPCL maintains 74% equity stake in the HRRL project.
  • Greenfield refinery-cum-petrochemical complex is nearing completion.
  • Trial runs for CDU and other units are currently in progress.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Trade & Finance: Promoter Group Member Discloses Shareholding
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 7(1)(b) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The disclosure, dated April 16, 2026, is from Bharathi Narendra Gala, a member of the Promoter Group, detailing their shareholdings in the company as of that date. The company has requested the stock exchange to record and disseminate this information.

  • Disclosure received under SEBI PIT Regulations.
  • From Bharathi Narendra Gala, a Promoter Group member.
  • Pertains to shareholdings in Enbee Trade & Finance.
  • Disclosure dated April 16, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [PSPLATINA] Propshare Platina Board Approves Q4/FY26 Results, Declares ₹23,288.99/Unit Distribution
item.description:
The Board of Directors of PropShare Investment Manager Private Limited, Investment Manager of Property Share Investment Trust and PropShare Platina, approved the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also declared distributions to Unitholders of ₹23,288.99 per unit, totaling ₹78.27 million for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This distribution comprises ₹4,795.93 per unit as interest payment and ₹18,493.06 per unit as repayment of debt. The audited financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2026, were also approved, pending unitholder approval at the upcoming Annual Meeting.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Distributions of ₹23,288.99 per unit declared for Q4 FY26.
  • Total distribution aggregates to ₹78.27 million for the quarter.
  • Distribution includes ₹4,795.93/unit interest and ₹18,493.06/unit debt repayment.
  • Annual financial statements approved, subject to unitholder approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Property Share Investment Trust - Propshare Platina | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RATHIST] Rathi Steel & Power gets GreenPro Ecolabel for TMT Rebars from CII
item.description:
Rathi Steel and Power Limited (RSPL) has been awarded the GreenPro ecolabel certification by the Confederation of Indian Industry (CII) for its Rathi Powertech brand of TMT rebars, specifically the Fe 550 Grade, manufactured at its Ghaziabad unit. This Type-1 Ecolabel signifies RSPL's commitment to sustainable manufacturing and environmental stewardship. The certification provides significant benefits, including essential credits for National and International Green Building certifications (like LEED or IGBC) for users and designers, and ensures a toxic-free environment. It also guarantees high-quality, durable steel for structural designers, streamlining due diligence and accelerating construction. This achievement aligns RSPL with global sustainability standards and the industry's shift towards "Green Steel" and reduced carbon footprints. Promoter Sh Udit Rathi emphasized the certification validates their commitment to sustainability and offers customer benefits in green certification compliance.

  • RSPL received GreenPro Ecolabel Certification from CII for its TMT rebars.
  • Certification covers Fe 550 Grade TMT rebars from its Ghaziabad unit.
  • Products provide credits for Green Building certifications like LEED/IGBC.
  • Reinforces company's commitment to sustainable manufacturing and "Green Steel".
  • Management highlights benefits for customers in green compliance and branding.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RATHI STEEL & POWER LTD.-$ | Category: ESG

item.title: [PSTITANIA] Propshare Titania declares 23,523.29/unit distribution, approves Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
The Board of Directors of PropShare Investment Manager Private Limited, Investment Manager for PropShare Titania SM REIT, approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for the year, subject to unitholder approval at the upcoming Annual Meeting. Furthermore, a distribution of 23,523.29 per unit, totaling 104.96 million, was declared for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This distribution comprises 12,005.92 per unit as interest payment and 11,517.37 per unit as repayment of debt. The Auditor's Report on the financial results and statements was noted.

  • Board approved audited Q4 and FY26 standalone and consolidated results.
  • FY26 audited financial statements approved, pending unitholder consent.
  • Declared distribution of 23,523.29 per unit for Q4 FY26.
  • Total Q4 FY26 distribution aggregates to 104.96 million.
  • Distribution includes interest payment and debt repayment components.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Propshare Titania SM REIT - IPO (Second scheme of the Property Share Investment Trust) | Category: Quarterly Result
